name: 二维码工具
description: 二维码工具模块，支持生成二维码、扫描解码二维码（图片或相机）、检测图片是否含二维码、查看和分享已生成的二维码
description_en: QR code tools: generate, decode from image or camera, detect QR presence, view and share generated codes

permissions.name: android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.desc: 用于将生成的二维码保存到 PandaGenie 目录
permissions.desc_en: Save generated QR images under the PandaGenie folder

permissions.name: android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.desc: 用于读取图片以解码二维码
permissions.desc_en: Read image files for QR decoding

permissions.name: android.permission.CAMERA
permissions.desc: 用于相机实时扫描二维码
permissions.desc_en: Camera access for live QR code scanning

apis.name: generateQR
apis.desc: 从文本或 URL 生成二维码 PNG 并保存到存储，返回文件路径和图片预览
apis.desc_en: Generate a QR code PNG from text or URL, returns file path and image preview
paramDesc: 输出图片边长（像素），默认 512
是否附带 PNG 的 Base64 预览，默认否
paramDesc_en: Output image side length in pixels, default 512
Include PNG as Base64 for preview, default false

apis.name: decodeQR
apis.desc: 扫描指定路径的图片，提取并返回二维码中的文本内容
apis.desc_en: Scan an image at the given path and extract QR code text content
paramDesc: 包含二维码的图片绝对路径
paramDesc_en: Absolute path to image file containing a QR code

apis.name: detectQR
apis.desc: 检测指定路径的图片是否包含二维码，返回检测结果和内容
apis.desc_en: Detect whether an image contains a QR code, returns detection result and content
paramDesc: 要检测的图片绝对路径
paramDesc_en: Absolute path to image to check for QR code

apis.name: listGenerated
apis.desc: 列出已保存到 PandaGenie/qrcode 目录下的二维码图片列表
apis.desc_en: List QR code PNG files saved under PandaGenie/qrcode

apis.name: openPage
apis.desc: 打开二维码工具的指定页面并返回 _openModule 信号，页面值: gen(生成), scan(相机扫描), gal(图库)
apis.desc_en: Open a specific QR tool page and return _openModule signal. Pages: gen(generate), scan(camera scan), gal(gallery)
